title: hieracium lazistanum subsp. leithneri
intro: Hieracium lazistanum subsp. leithneri, commonly known as Lazistan hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Hieracium lazistanum subsp. leithneri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used in herbal medicine to support various health conditions.
